config.script:
"""
		Written By: Niladri Banerjee
		Written Date: 20/06/2024
		Purpose: If previous page not logged in then navigate to login page. 
	"""
	try:
	#start of try block
		#Check if user is logged or not if not then navigate to login page
		previousPage = self.session.custom.IsBOMCopyAuthenticated
		if not previousPage:
			system.perspective.navigate('/')
		else:
			self.session.custom.TopViewHeader = "BOM Copy"
			self.getChild("root").getChild("drp_area").props.value=-1
			self.getChild("root").getChild("drp_line").props.value=-1
			self.getChild("root").getChild("drp_model").props.value=-1
			self.getChild("root").getChild("drp_bomfrom").props.value=-1
			self.getChild("root").getChild("Drp_bomto").props.value=-1
	#End of try block		
	except: 
	#start of except block  
		screenName ='BOMCopy'   
		filePath=str('Project_VECV/Configuration/BOMCopy')  
		errorFunction = str('Event:onStartup  -> BOMCopy')  
		errorType=str('Application')  
		errorCode = str(Project_VECV.Common.GenerateUUID.getUniqueUUID())   
		description=str(sys.exc_info()[1]) #error description 
		lineNumber=str(sys.exc_info()[2].tb_lineno) #lineno on which error 
		Project_VECV.Configuration.Common.AddLogDetails.AddErrorLogs(screenName,filePath,errorFunction,errorType,errorCode,description,lineNumber)

"""
		Written By: Niladri Banerjee
		Written Date: 20/06/2024
		Purpose: Copy one bom data into another bom. 
	"""
	try:
		data=self.getSibling("Table").props.data
		bomidto=int(self.getSibling("Drp_bomto").props.value)
		bomidfrom=self.getSibling("drp_bomfrom").props.value
		createdby=2
		result=0
	#self.session.custom.loggedInUserId
		for row in range(len(data)):
			WSID=int(data[row]['MST_WorkStation_Id'])
			WIID=int(data[row]['MST_WorkInstruction_Id'])
			#system.perspective.print(WSID)
			isselected=data[row]['Select']
			if isselected==1:
				params={'bomidto':bomidto,'WSID':WSID,'WIID':WIID,'createdby':createdby}
				result=system.db.runNamedQuery("Project_VECV/BomCopy/AddBomCopy",params)
		system.perspective.sendMessage("RefreshTable")
		result=result[0][0]
		#system.perspective.print(result)
		if result==1:
			message="BOM Copied Successfully"
			messageType = 'popup_View' 
			state='success'   			
			system.perspective.sendMessage(messageType,payload = {"display":1,'state':str(state),'text':str(message)},scope = 'page' )
			self.getSibling("Table").props.selection.selectedRow=-1
			self.getSibling("Table").props.selection.selectedColumn=''
	except:	
		#start of except block		
		screenName ='BOM Copy Screen' 
		filePath=str('Project_VECV/BomCopy/table')
		errorFunction = str('Event:onButtonclick - CopyWI')
		errorType=str('Application')
		errorCode = str(Project_VECV.Common.GenerateUUID.getUniqueUUID()) 			
		description=str(sys.exc_info()[1]) #error description
		lineNumber=str(sys.exc_info()[2].tb_lineno) #lineno on which error occur			
		Project_VECV.Configuration.Common.AddLogDetails.AddErrorLogs(screenName,filePath,errorFunction,errorType,errorCode,description,lineNumber)

"""
		Written By: Niladri Banerjee
		Written Date: 21/06/2024
		Purpose: on row click, pass remark based on selection. 
	"""
	
	try:
		checkdata=self.props.data[self.props.selection.selectedRow]['Select']
		if checkdata==0 and str(self.props.selection.selectedColumn)=="Select":
			self.props.data[self.props.selection.selectedRow]['Select']=1
			if int(self.props.data[self.props.selection.selectedRow]['OPCountTo'])>0:
				self.props.data[self.props.selection.selectedRow]['Remark']='Existing ' + str(self.getSibling("Table").props.data[self.props.selection.selectedRow]['OPCountTo'])+' assigned OP(s) will be deleted'	
		if checkdata==1 and str(self.props.selection.selectedColumn)=="Select":
			self.props.data[self.props.selection.selectedRow]['Select']=0
			self.props.data[self.props.selection.selectedRow]['Remark']=''
	except:	
		#start of except block		
		screenName ='BOM Copy Screen' 
		filePath=str('Project_VECV/BomCopy/table')
		errorFunction = str('Event:onRowClick - BomCopy')
		errorType=str('Application')
		errorCode = str(Project_VECV.Common.GenerateUUID.getUniqueUUID()) 			
		description=str(sys.exc_info()[1]) #error description
		lineNumber=str(sys.exc_info()[2].tb_lineno) #lineno on which error occur			
		Project_VECV.Configuration.Common.AddLogDetails.AddErrorLogs(screenName,filePath,errorFunction,errorType,errorCode,description,lineNumber)

"""
		Written By: Niladri Banerjee
		Written Date: 22/06/2024
		Purpose: Reset values when Area value changes. 
	"""
	self.getSibling("drp_line").props.value=-1
	self.getSibling("drp_model").props.value=-1
	self.getSibling("drp_bomfrom").props.value=-1
	self.getSibling("Drp_bomto").props.value=-1
	self.getSibling("Checkbox_selectall").props.selected=False

"""
		Written By: Niladri Banerjee
		Written Date: 22/06/2024
		Purpose: Reset values when Line value changes. 
	"""
	self.getSibling("drp_model").props.value=-1
	self.getSibling("drp_bomfrom").props.value=-1
	self.getSibling("Drp_bomto").props.value=-1
	self.getSibling("Checkbox_selectall").props.selected=False

"""
		Written By: Niladri Banerjee
		Written Date: 22/06/2024
		Purpose: Reset values when model value changes. 
	"""
	self.getSibling("drp_bomfrom").props.value=-1
	self.getSibling("Drp_bomto").props.value=-1
	self.getSibling("Checkbox_selectall").props.selected=False

onChange.script:
"""
		Written By: Niladri Banerjee
		Written Date: 22/06/2024
		Purpose: Select/Deselect all rows. 
	"""
	try:
		self.getSibling("Table").props.selection.selectedRow=-1
		self.getSibling("Table").props.selection.selectedColumn=''
		data=self.getSibling("Table").props.data
		#system.perspective.print(currentValue)
		if currentValue.value==0:
			for row in range(len(data)):
				self.getSibling("Table").props.data[row]['Select']=0
				self.getSibling("Table").props.data[row]['Remark']=''
		if currentValue.value==1:
			for row in range(len(data)):
				self.getSibling("Table").props.data[row]['Select']=1
				if int(self.getSibling("Table").props.data[row]['OPCountTo'])>0:
					self.getSibling("Table").props.data[row]['Remark']='Existing ' + str(self.getSibling("Table").props.data[row]['OPCountTo'])+' assigned OP(s) will be deleted'
	except:	
		#start of except block		
		screenName ='BOM Copy Screen' 
		filePath=str('Project_VECV/BomCopy')
		errorFunction = str('Event:onchangescript - SelectAll')
		errorType=str('Application')
		errorCode = str(Project_VECV.Common.GenerateUUID.getUniqueUUID()) 			
		description=str(sys.exc_info()[1]) #error description
		lineNumber=str(sys.exc_info()[2].tb_lineno) #lineno on which error occur			
		Project_VECV.Configuration.Common.AddLogDetails.AddErrorLogs(screenName,filePath,errorFunction,errorType,errorCode,description,lineNumber)

config.script:
"""
		Written By: Niladri Banerjee
		Written Date: 20/06/2024
		Purpose: Deselect row on double click. 
	"""
	self.getChild("Table").props.selection.selectedRow=-1
	self.getChild("Table").props.selection.selectedColumn=''

messageHandlers.script:
"""
		Written By: Niladri Banerjee
		Written Date: 20/06/2024
		Purpose: call popup message hanlder. 
	"""
	# implement your handler here
	#system.perspective.print('In Popup')		
	state=payload['state']
	message=payload['text']
	Project_VECV.PopUp.Alerts.showAlert(str(state), str(state.capitalize()), str(message), "true", "Okay", "", "", "", "", "closePopup", "closePopup", "closePopup","","","","")
